ops.title: Re-stamp fleet Models tables to codex-wrapper wording (repo-bootstrap 0.38.2 template + ~31 repos + captain-hook CLAUDE.md)

ops.text: fleet-wide grep for 'runs the codex skill'/'sonnet wrapper codex'/'never Skill(codex)' yields zero hits outside historical CHANGELOGs; gpt-5.5 rows reference codex:codex-wrapper and inline Skill(codex)
